query:
-- Get the IDs of the newly inserted Newmont contacts
SELECT id, name, email FROM contacts 
WHERE company = 'Newmont' 
  AND project = 'Cadia Gold Mine Operations'
  AND enrichmentSource = 'apollo'
  AND email IN (
    'chris.dark@newmont.com', 'rachel.manger@newmont.com', 'danny.ramunno@newmont.com',
    'jarrad.haynes@newmont.com', 'jennifer.cope@newmont.com', 'john.fisher@newmont.com',
    'ash.hooper@newmont.com', 'dale.hicks@newmont.com', 'andrew.daly@newmont.com',
    'vern.kelsey@newmont.com', 'mike.adendorff@newmont.com', 'alexis.singleton@newmont.com',
    'kevin.elms@newmont.com', 'ami.parekh@newmont.com'
  )
ORDER BY id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute
